playbook.intent: Take one repeatedly-sold engagement (e.g. 'Stripe integration audit', 'Next.js perf pass', 'CI pipeline setup') and convert it into a named, fixed-price productized service with a public landing page, SOP, intake form, and a delivery checklist that lets you book it without a discovery call.
playbook.scope: Take one repeatedly-sold engagement (e.g. 'Stripe integration audit', 'Next.js perf pass', 'CI pipeline setup') and convert it into a named, fixed-price productized service with a public landing page, SOP, intake form, and a delivery checklist that lets you book it without a discovery call.

success-criteria.criterion: Mine the pattern stage complete: Engagement tag report
Scope + price stage complete: Scope doc
Build the surface stage complete: Landing live
Soft-launch stage complete: 3-5 paid soft-launch deliveries

stage.name: Mine the pattern
stage.intent: Pull a candidate from past invoices.

tasks.task: Tag last 12 months of engagements by type
Find the most repeated, highest-margin pattern
Validate it's still in demand by 3 prospect calls

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when one pattern is dominant AND validated by external prospects.

stage.name: Scope + price
stage.intent: Fixed scope + fixed price + clear upsell ladder.

tasks.task: Set fixed price + scope-cap + upsell tier prices

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when intake form weeds out obvious bad fits.

stage.name: Build the surface
stage.intent: Landing page + booking flow + delivery checklist live.

tasks.task: Wire booking flow to intake form

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when end-to-end booking works without your manual intervention.

stage.name: Soft-launch
stage.intent: Sell to 3-5 past clients; harvest case studies.

tasks.task: Send tailored offer to past clients fitting the pattern
Deliver against SOP; refine based on friction
Publish 1-page case studies from soft-launch deliveries

stage.decision-gate: Advance only with ≥3 paid deliveries + ≥2 published case studies.

extra.value: [Hiring employees or building a team — solo operator throughout, Enterprise procurement processes — SMB / startup buyers only]
[Active freelance practice with at least one paying client, A bookkeeping / time-tracking baseline in place]
[Treating decision_gate as a suggestion — playbook collapses to a checklist if gates are not enforced, Skipping written artifacts because 'it's in my head' — kills traceability and future re-use]
['Did every stage produce a written artifact a stranger could read?', 'Did I actually advance only when the decision_gate criterion was met?']

{human: faion get-content productize-recurring-engagement --format md, agent: faion get-content productize-recurring-engagement --format context, json: faion get-content productize-recurring-engagement --format json}
[{version: 0.1.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: 'Initial draft for F-064 P3 technical-freelancer persona, synthesis angle'}]
